column1: # 3MB App0 (OTA_0) / 3MB App1 (OTA_1) / ~9.9MB LittleFS gallery + small coredump
# Offsets/sizes in hex. Total flash = 0x1000000 (16 MB).
# The first 0x9000 is reserved for 2nd-stage bootloader + this partition table.
# NOTE: the data partition is named/subtyped "spiffs" so that the default
#       LittleFS.begin() (partition label "spiffs") mounts it without extra args.
#       We format it as LittleFS via board_build.filesystem = littlefs.
